title: Combined Lung Immune Prognostic Index (LIPI)-Glasgow Prognostic Score (GPS) as a Prognostic Tool in Extensive-Stage Small-Cell Lung Cancer Treated with First-Line Chemo-Immunotherapy.
snippet: Inflammatory and immune-based prognostic markers such as the Lung Immune Prognostic Index (LIPI) and the Glasgow Prognostic Score (GPS) have gained increasing attention in ES-SCLC, particularly in patients receiving first-line chemoimmunotherapy. However, no prior study has explored a broader, integrated inflammatory framework that evaluates these parameter...
